title: T4A Own Source feed (v1.0)
description: A single JSON document = the complete current catalogue of one brand. Strictly formatted; the portal validates it, it does NOT transform it. Any violation rejects the whole import.

schemaVersion.description: Must match a version the portal supports.

brand.description: Becomes the Shopify vendor default and a UI label.

currency.description: ISO-4217 currency code of all prices in the feed.

generatedAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp the feed was produced. Used for staleness checks.

products.description: The full snapshot. Present = upsert, absent = removed (per the feed's removal policy).

externalId.description: Stable id of the parent in the supplier's system. Unique within the feed.

tags.description: Flat tags, pushed to Shopify as-is.

categoryPaths.description: "A / B" hierarchical paths; expanded to ["A", "A / B"] like the AI categories.

sku.description: Identity key. Globally unique within the feed. Drives Shopify SKU->variant matching.

option1.description: The variant option value (e.g. sail size). Falls back to SKU for sizeless.

amount.description: The price the supplier wants listed (markup already baked in).

taxMode.description: How `amount` is expressed; normalized to the portal's NET convention at ingest.
